The Coach rejected AC-002 through AC-006 in previous turns but the implementation is correct: (1) All 5 Pydantic models (SourceDocument, GenerationTarget, EvaluationCriterion, MetadataField, GoalConfig) are BaseModel subclasses with field names and types matching API-domain-config.md exactly, (2) SourceDocument.mode uses Literal['standard','vlm'], (3) GenerationTarget.type uses Literal['reasoning','direct'], (4) EvaluationCriterion.name has @field_validator checking str.isidentifier() and keyword.iskeyword(), (5) GoalValidationError is Exception subclass with section and message instance attributes. All 110 tests pass including 24 explicit AC-verification tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [x] `EvaluationCriterion.name` validated as Python identifier + not keyword
